pageContext.name: Superman Classic 1/4oz Gold Coin
pageContext.description: The MAN OF STEEL™ returns on a visually stunning engraved 1/4oz gold coin whose design heroes SUPERMAN™ in two poses. Frosted finishing of his powerful poses contrasts beautifully against a mirror background incorporating the iconic S shield. As legal tender, the effigy of Queen Elizabeth II can be found on the obverse.  This coin is beautifully engraved and shows SUPERMAN posing powerfully. The ¼ oz gold coins show a close-up view of SUPERMAN beneath the iconic S shield. This is an impressive collectible, comprising themed packaging to match.   Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm it as legal tender and shows the coin's unique number in its limited mintage. Laser your focus and fly in fast - these are going to be super-limited and super-demanded!
